title: bastardia viscosa
intro: Bastardia viscosa, also known as sticky bastardia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Bastardia viscosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin infections.
